case_title: STAN PALATNIKOV VS. GOLDEN GATE TOW COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2011 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED SEP-29-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW COMPANY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY PALATNIKOV, STAN AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-07-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALATNIKOV, STAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW COMPANY THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT'S PAYMENT OF $500.00 RESULTED IN A COMPROMISE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALATNIKOV, STAN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
